clinical_criteria: Age at measurement ≥18 years (exclude measurements <18 years)
Exclude measurements taken at Inpatient or Emergency Department visits
Keep only measurements taken at Outpatient visits
Exclude measurements for individuals with Cancer at time of BMI measurement
Exclude measurements for individuals with Pregnancy on date of measurement
Remove height and weight measurements outside +/-6SD by sex before calculating BMI
Remove BMI measurements outside +/-6SD by sex from overall mean after all other exclusions
Weight and height should be from the same timepoint
Expected units: Weight in kg, Height in meters, BMI in kg/meter²
algorithm_summary: The BMI phenotype algorithm: 1) Extracts weight and height measurements using SNOMED codes from reference files (Weight_codes.csv and Height_codes.csv), 2) Converts units to kg for weight and meters for height, 3) Excludes measurements from individuals <18 years, inpatient/ED visits, and those with cancer or pregnancy, 4) Removes statistical outliers (±6SD by sex) for height, weight, and calculated BMI, 5) Calculates BMI using formula: BMI = (Weight in kg)/(Height in m)², 6) Computes median BMI and median age per individual from remaining measurements for final analysis.
